message:
fix(connectors): Pinecone URL encoding, path sanitization for Pinecone and Qdrant

- Fix Pinecone fetch() to use reqwest .query() instead of manual string
  interpolation, preventing issues with special characters in vector IDs
  and namespaces
- Add sanitize_path_segment() to Pinecone (index names) and Qdrant
  (collection names) to prevent path traversal attacks
- Add InvalidInput error variant to both connectors with proper FCP
  error mapping and retryability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
